pages.text:
Dear Mr. Prime Minister:

It is my pleasure to offer you my warmest congratulations as you assume the office of President of the Government of Spain.

Meeting the challenges that confront us worldwide will not be easy, but I am confident that we will succeed. The bonds of friendship that unite our two countries and the mutual support of the community of democratic nations will sustain us as we work toward a more peaceful world.

(Sent over BY HAND February 28, 1981)

fullText:
Dear Mr. Prime Minister:

It is my pleasure to offer you my warmest congratulations as you assume the office of President of the Government of Spain.

Meeting the challenges that confront us worldwide will not be easy, but I am confident that we will succeed. The bonds of friendship that unite our two countries and the mutual support of the community of democratic nations will sustain us as we work toward a more peaceful world.

(Sent over BY HAND February 28, 1981)

-- 1 of 1 --
